title: hibbertia riparia
intro: Hibbertia riparia, also known as Guinea flower, is a small, perennial shrub native to the eastern regions of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hibbertia riparia include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Hibbertia riparia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies.
